conclusion: The Main Hub API exposed no cataloged backup artifact that could be restored to an isolated forensic database to reconstruct the deleted 585-row temporary manifest. A running backup worker is not proof that a restorable artifact exists.
limits: This API observation does not prove that no uncataloged filesystem, volume, WAL archive, or off-system copy exists.
No backup was created, downloaded, restored, deleted, or otherwise mutated during this read-only audit.
